caption: In a studio setting, a woman wearing a green long-sleeved shirt and headphones speaks into a microphone. She is seen from the chest up, gesturing with her hands while talking. A man wearing a black t-shirt is partially visible in the background of one shot, and later, a man wearing a red sweatshirt, sunglasses, and headphones appears, smiling toward the woman. Professional audio equipment, including microphones on boom arms and a mixing console, is present on the table. Across several frames, an overlay of white particles floats over the scene, and the text "BOSS TALK 101" appears in a stylized white font across the lower half of the screen. The sequence transitions from a close-up of the woman to shots including the other participants, showing their interactions during a recorded conversation.
